text: Phoenix is a Duelist. Hailing from the UK, Phoenix's star power shines through in his fighting style, igniting the battlefield with flash and flare.
Phoenix ability Blaze:Deploys a wall of fire that blocks vision and damages anyone passing through it. It also heals Phoenix if he stands in it.
Phoenix ability Curveball:Throws a curved flare that detonates into a brilliant light, temporarily blinding all players who see it.
Phoenix ability Hot Hands:Throws a fireball that creates a lingering fire zone on the ground, damaging enemies and healing Phoenix.
Phoenix ultimate Run It Back: Places a marker at Phoenix's location. While active, dying or allowing the timer to expire will respawn him at that location with full health.
Sage is a Sentinel. The stronghold of China, Sage creates safety for herself and her team by reviving fallen allies and warding off aggressive pushes.
Sage ability Barrier Orb:Deploys a solid, four-segmented wall that can be used to block paths or boost players to higher vantage points.
Sage ability Slow Orb:Throws an orb that breaks into a field of ice, slowing and making noise when players walk across it.
Sage ability Healing Orb:Heals an ally or Sage herself over a short duration.
Sage ultimate Resurrection: Targets a fallen ally's corpse to bring them back to life with full health after a brief delay.
Sova is a Initiator. Born from the eternal winter of Russia's tundra, Sova tracks, finds, and eliminates enemies with ruthless efficiency.
Sova ability Owl Drone:Deploys a pilotable drone that can fire a marking dart to reveal the location of any enemy hit.
Sova ability Shock Bolt:Fires an explosive bolt that emits a damaging pulse of energy upon impact.
Sova ability Recon Bolt:Fires a bolt that deploys a sonar emitter, revealing the location of nearby enemies caught in its line of sight.
Sova ultimate Hunter's Fury: Fires up to three long-range energy blasts that pierce through walls and reveal any hit enemies.
